INVALID.COMMENT: If the term “timeshare” appears in the commencing / beginning / easement / except section of a document, the document should NOT be considered invalid. However, the document will be considered INVALID if “timeshare” is mentioned within the valid legal description area.

INVALID.CONDITION: The transaction pertains to a timeshare ownership basis, .
INVALID.PID(POSITION OF DOCUMENT): inside the legal area with term "week " & "timeshare"
INVALID.COMMENT: For timeshare-related documents, the presence of the term “week” in the legal description area indicates a timeshare interest. Such documents must be considered INVALID, even if the term appears within an otherwise valid legal description.

INVALID.CONDITION: if the buyer's name had phrases such as "oil and gas ", "petrolium", or "mineral", the document should be considered as invalid
INVALID.PID(POSITION OF DOCUMENT): buyer name
INVALID.COMMENT: The presence of these terms signals a mineral or energy rights transaction, not a complete real estate sale, so the document is marked invalid for full-property ownership purposes.

INVALID.CONDITION: if oil, gas, and other minerals are mentioned as a header of the legal description area, the document should be considered as invalid
INVALID.PID(POSITION OF DOCUMENT): legal description heading
INVALID.COMMENT: the legal description itself defines the conveyance as oil/gas/mineral interest only, the document does not qualify as a valid full-property deed and must be marked INVALID.

INVALID.CONDITION: Legal starts with mentioning the cemetery/cemetery plots
INVALID.PID(POSITION OF DOCUMENT): legal description area as the header or just mentioning as cemetery
INVALID.COMMENT: cemetery or cemetery plot descriptions indicate burial rights rather than land ownership, these documents do not meet the criteria for valid real-estate deeds and must be marked INVALID

INVALID.CONDITION: if the term "interval" is mentioned in the valid legal description area, such documents are considered as invalid .
INVALID.PID(POSITION OF DOCUMENT): on the legal area
INVALID.COMMENT: Interval-based transactions are also known as Timeshare properties that are divided into time-based ownership or usage periods (called intervals) If a legal description mentions an interval, it confirms the document is a timeshare interest, not a full real-property conveyance. Therefore, the work must be marked INVALID

INVALID.CONDITION: extract of a particular trust name will be mentioned in the header of document along with a valid header name.

INVALID.CONDITION: Property address and legal details mentioned in another county deatils
INVALID.PID(POSITION OF DOCUMENT): property mentioned area or legal page

INVALID.CONDITION: if the buyer's name had phrases "timber", the document should be considered as invalid
INVALID.PID(POSITION OF DOCUMENT): buyer name
INVALID.COMMENT: A document is considered INVALID when the buyer’s name contains the term “Timber” because it usually indicates a limited natural-resource interest, not a full real-property transfer.

INVALID.Logic: Easement , servitudes and right of way
INVALID.CONDITION: If easement , servitudes and right of way heading is mentioned in the legal starting or exhibit A , the document should be considered as invalid.
INVALID.PID(POSITION OF DOCUMENT): on the starting of the legal description area
INVALID.COMMENT: Marked INVALID because the legal description / Exhibit A identifies an easement, servitude, or right of way, indicating a limited-use interest rather than a fee-simple real-property conveyance.

INVALID.Logic: lease term - less than 10 years mentioned
INVALID.CONDITION: Memorandum of Lease should be considered INVALID when the lease term is less than 10 years
INVALID.PID(POSITION OF DOCUMENT): occurring in the second paragraph of the document
INVALID.COMMENT: If a Memorandum of Lease shows a lease term of less than 10 years, it represents a short-term possessory right only, not an ownership or long-term real-property interest, and therefore must be marked INVALID.

INVALID.CONDITION: if the legal starts with right of way / freeway  , the document will be considered as invalid
INVALID.PID(POSITION OF DOCUMENT): as a header or the start of the legal description
INVALID.COMMENT: Documents are marked INVALID when “Right of Way” appears at the start of the legal description because it clearly defines the transaction as a limited-use right, not a transfer of property ownership.

INVALID.CONDITION: if a "non - freeway " term is mentioned as a sub heading , the document will be cosidered as invalid , here the buyer name mentioned is "department of transportation " these also satisfies the rule of invalid document.
INVALID.PID(POSITION OF DOCUMENT): sub heading inside the bracket and the buyer name
INVALID.COMMENT: The document should be considered INVALID when “NON-FREEWAY” appears as a sub-heading and the buyer is the Department of Transportation (DOT) because both elements clearly indicate a transportation right-of-way acquisition, not a full property conveyance.

INVALID.CONDITION: A document should be considered INVALID when the legal description starts with “Timber Land” or similar timber-related wording
INVALID.PID(POSITION OF DOCUMENT): on the starting of legal description page
INVALID.COMMENT: If the legal description starts with timber land wording, it confirms the document conveys a timber-related interest only, not full real property ownership, and therefore must be marked INVALID

INVALID.CONDITION: if the buyer name had the phrase "cemetery " the document should be considered as invalid
INVALID.PID(POSITION OF DOCUMENT): buyer name
INVALID.COMMENT: A document should be considered INVALID when the buyer’s name contains the term “Cemetery” because it typically reflects a burial-rights or cemetery-use transaction, not a standard real-property ownership transfer.

INVALID.CONDITION: bill board lease
INVALID.PID(POSITION OF DOCUMENT): near by the heading or inside the body of the document
INVALID.COMMENT: If the document contains the phrase “billboard” (including variations such as bill board) or if the lease is related to billboard structures, signage, or advertising rights, the document must be marked as INVALID.

INVALID.CONDITION: If the Borrower (Mortgage) or Buyer (Deed) name itself indicates mineral/oil/gas/timber/carbon business → INVALID.
INVALID.COMMENT:
KEYWARDS-OIL,GAS,MINERAL,PETROLEUM,TIMBER,CARBON,SOLAR,ENERGY,ROYALTY,ENERGY,PIPELINE,DRAINAGE                                                 AND ENTITY REQUIREMENT (must also contain):
INC,LLC,CORP,COMPANY,HOLDINGS,PARTNERS 
If BOTH keyword + entity term appear in the party name, then: ITS INVALID

INVALID.CONDITION: If the legal description begins with “Surface Rights,” the document must be considered INVALID.
INVALID.PID(POSITION OF DOCUMENT): starting of the legal portion
INVALID.COMMENT:
When a legal description starts with “Surface Rights”, it usually means the document is conveying only the surface estate, not the full fee simple ownership of the property. this is similar to the mineral rights , oil & gas rights , air rights 
The document is dealing with only part of the property rights, not the entire property. therefore it does not meet standard property document criteria.
